skill.name: turborepo-caching
skill.description: Configure Turborepo for efficient monorepo builds with local and remote caching. Use when setting up Turborepo, optimizing build pipelines, or implementing distributed caching.
skill.summary: Configure Turborepo for efficient monorepo builds with local and remote caching.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All 47 static findings are false positives. The skill contains Turborepo documentation and configuration templates with CLI command examples. The flagged patterns (external commands, network URLs, filesystem operations) are legitimate documentation showing Turborepo usage patterns, not actual code execution risks. No malicious intent or security vulnerabilities confirmed.

content.value_statement: Monorepo builds become slow and inefficient without proper caching. This skill provides production-ready Turborepo configurations for local and remote caching to dramatically reduce build times.
actual_capabilities: Set up Vercel remote caching for team collaboration
Debug cache misses with turbo dry-run and verbosity flags
Configure package-specific build pipelines with dependencies
Implement efficient CI workflows with affected package filtering
limitations: Does not install Turborepo or manage npm dependencies
Cannot access existing project files to analyze current configuration
Does not execute turbo commands or run builds
Does not provide debug symbols or runtime profiling

use_cases.title: Initial Turborepo Setup
use_cases.description: Set up a new monorepo with optimized caching from day one

use_cases.title: CI/CD Performance Optimization
use_cases.description: Reduce CI build times by 50-90% with remote caching and affected package filtering

use_cases.title: Self-Hosted Cache Infrastructure
use_cases.description: Deploy a private cache server for organizations without Vercel
use_cases.target_user: Enterprise teams needing private caching solutions

prompt_templates.title: Basic turbo.json Setup
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a turbo.json configuration with build, test, lint, and dev tasks. Include proper outputs and dependencies.
prompt_templates.scenario: Setting up a new Turborepo project

prompt_templates.title: Remote Cache Configuration
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me how to configure Vercel remote caching for my Turborepo project with environment variables for CI.
prompt_templates.scenario: Enabling distributed caching across CI and local development

prompt_templates.title: CI Pipeline with Affected Packages
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that only builds packages affected by the current changes using turbo filtering.
prompt_templates.scenario: Optimizing CI performance with package filtering

prompt_templates.title: Self-Hosted Cache Server
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an Express.js server implementation for a self-hosted Turborepo remote cache with artifact storage.

output_examples.input: Create a turbo.json with a build pipeline that caches dist and .next outputs
output_examples.output: A complete turbo.json with build task configuration including outputs, dependencies, and environment variables

output_examples.input: How do I set up remote caching with Vercel?
output_examples.output: Step-by-step instructions for running npx turbo login, npx turbo link, and configuring TURBO_TOKEN in CI

best_practices: Always define explicit outputs to avoid caching unnecessary files
Use remote caching in CI to share build results across all developers
Configure dependsOn correctly to prevent race conditions between tasks
anti_patterns: Do not cache persistent tasks like dev servers (use persistent: true instead)
Do not include secrets in environment variables that turbo caches
Do not skip dependsOn as it can cause build failures in dependent packages

faq.question: What is Turborepo remote caching?
faq.answer: Remote caching stores build artifacts in the cloud (Vercel or self-hosted) so team members and CI can reuse previous builds instead of rebuilding.

faq.question: How do I debug cache misses?
faq.answer: Use turbo build --dry-run to see what would execute, or turbo build --summarize to see cache hit/miss status for each task.

faq.question: Can I use Turborepo without Vercel?
faq.answer: Yes, you can self-host the remote cache using the Turborepo HTTP API. Example implementation is provided in this skill.

faq.question: What does dependsOn do in turbo.json?
faq.answer: dependsOn defines task dependencies. Use ^build to wait for dependencies to build first, or specify exact tasks that must complete.

faq.question: How do I filter builds to only changed packages?
faq.answer: Use turbo build --filter='...[origin/main]' to build only packages that changed since the main branch.

faq.question: Are .env files included in cache keys?
faq.answer: Yes, if listed in globalDependencies in turbo.json. This ensures builds rerun when environment configuration changes.
